conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The second paragraph must approve the vacation days.
new_constraint: The second paragraph must include the phrase "Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time."
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The second paragraph must approve the vacation days. The second paragraph must include the phrase "Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time."
response:
Subject: Re: Vacation Request Approval

Dear [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your request for time off. We have reviewed your schedule and the coverage plan you provided to ensure a smooth transition during your absence.

Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time due to an unexpected increase in workload that requires all team members to remain available through the end of the month. We will be reviewing your request again once the current project deadlines have been met and will get back to you with a decision by next Friday.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Job Title]
